ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological pathway */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the biological pathway */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* Gene Ontology identifier for the pathway */,
  "manual_annotation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pathway has been manually annotated */,
  "auto_annotation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pathway has been automatically annotated */,
  "checked_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pathway has been checked for accuracy */,
  "blacklisted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pathway is blacklisted */,
  "is_obsolete" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pathway is obsolete */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological pathway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pathway was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pathway was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated pathway */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the annotation */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "revised_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revised or updated annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_to_category" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated category */,
  "mapping_type" TEXT /* Type of mapping (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_to_category_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES pathway_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_to_category_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reference */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., journal, book) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_references_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway being tracked */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the pathway */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_versions_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the pathway has been viewed */,
  "annotation_count" INTEGER /* Number of annotations associated with the pathway */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pathway statistics were last updated */,
  "views_by_role" TEXT /* Views by user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_stats_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_hierarchy" TEXT /* Hierarchical relationship between roles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, annotate) */,
  "log_comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
